sync-service / weekly status

sync-service — week 28

auto-generated

Weekly engineering status for the sync-service platform team: what shipped, current reliability posture, and open carryover work.

SEV-3 · 12m

p95 latency
down 30ms

Highlights

The queue-consumer rewrite landed and is now carrying full production traffic, which is the main driver behind this week's latency drop — p95 fell from 248ms to 218ms as batched acknowledgements replaced the old per-message commit path. We also closed out the retry-storm root cause from two weeks ago with a proper backoff ceiling, and shipped the first pass of per-tenant rate limiting ahead of the enterprise onboarding push next sprint.

The one open wrinkle: a Thursday config deploy briefly mis-set a feature flag default and tripped a short SEV-3, detailed below and in the carryover timeline.

Shipped

PR Title Author Risk
#1042 Rewrite queue consumer for batched acks Dana K. Medium
#1044 Add exponential backoff ceiling to retry client Omar F. Low
#1046 Per-tenant rate limiting, phase 1 Dana K. Medium
#1047 Fix flaky consumer-lag integration test Priya S. Low
#1049 Revert feature-flag default after Thursday incident Omar F. Low
#1051 Bump consumer autoscaling floor from 2 to 4 pods Priya S. Low

Velocity

PRs merged per day
Mon

Tue
1
Wed
2
Thu
1
Fri
1

Gotcha. The new autoscaling floor (#1051) raises baseline pod count from 2 to 4 — steady-state compute cost for the consumer fleet goes up roughly 40% even at idle. Confirm the budget owner has seen this before it rides along in next week's release.

Carryover

  1. Queue-consumer rewrite shipped to 100% Tue

    Batched acknowledgements fully rolled out; old per-message commit path removed.

  2. Retry-storm backoff ceiling closed Wed

    Root cause from the week 26 retry storm fixed with a hard backoff ceiling; no repeat this week.

  3. Per-tenant rate limiting, phase 2 in progress

    Phase 1 (limits enforced, no UI) is live; phase 2 adds the tenant-facing quota dashboard ahead of enterprise onboarding.

  4. Incident postmortem for Thursday SEV-3 pending

    Write-up due within 48 hours per policy; owner is Omar F.

2026-07-02 16:47 UTC  deploy sync-service@f03b1d8  retry backoff ceiling + rate-limit phase 1
2026-07-03 11:02 UTC  deploy sync-service@7e2a90c  hotfix: revert feature-flag default (SEV-3 remediation)
